title: Rattle Audit Findings
description: Output of the rattle-auditor (configurator domain) and rattle-techdoc-auditor (techdoc domain) workflows. The two domains share this envelope but use different check-id sets and different severity ladders; the `domain` discriminator selects which.

doc_type.description: Backend doc_type (technical_doc on writes; the legacy alias technical_documentation may appear on read-only fields).

techdoc_summary.description: Techdoc severity ladder mirrors the audit-checks.md tier (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW/passed). The structural pass runs 14 checks (12 numbered + 10b default-fallback-symbol + 10c mismatched-ghs-pictogram); the full pass adds safety-notice + HP-statement + language-quality sub-checks (~30 total).

finding.description: Cross-domain finding. The `check_id` is open-ended (configurator domain emits the 6 ids enumerated in skills/rattle-configurator/references/structural-checks.md; techdoc domain emits the 14 ids in skills/rattle-techdoc/references/audit-checks.md plus safety-notice / HP-statement / language-quality sub-check ids). The `severity` value's allowed set depends on the domain: configurator uses error/warning/info; techdoc uses CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW (the structural ladder).

entity_type.description: Open-ended discriminator. Configurator emits {area, group, option, document_template, document_content_block, document_structure_block, audit}. Techdoc emits additionally {template_attachment, safety_notice, hp_statement, block_locale, paragraph}.

structure_block_id.description: Techdoc only: the structure block the finding targets.

structure_block_slug.description: Techdoc only: stable slug for the structure block.

evidence.description: Techdoc only: quoted text or block-id pointer.

correction.description: Techdoc only: one-line action that resolves the finding.

minimum_fix.description: Configurator only: minimum action to remediate.
